overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red trench coat walking through a modern city waterfront. The video begins in afternoon daylight along a river promenade with stone balustrades and skyscrapers, transitions through a parking area, and ends with a dramatic shift to a rainy night scene with illuminated buildings.

events.description: character turns left away from the river toward a parking area
transition from paved promenade to asphalt parking lot surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the riverside promenade before turning left toward a parking area

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench near the building entrance

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with rounded balusters along the river edge
choppy dark water with industrial structures visible on the far bank
tall glass and steel office towers with reflective facades
decorative stone lampposts with multiple spherical lights
trees with orange and red foliage in large rectangular planters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete riverside promenade bordered by an ornate stone balustrade. Modern glass skyscrapers rise on both sides while autumn trees line the left side. The character turns left toward a parking area where parked cars become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed urban waterfront with parking and pedestrian walkway

events.description: passing a couple standing by the railing overlooking the river
sun emerges from behind clouds creating strong backlight and lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot, crossing the street, and returning to the riverside path

notable_agents.action: couple standing by the stone railing looking out at the river

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including silver and red sedans along the curb
metal truss bridge spanning the river in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an asphalt parking area with parked cars visible on the left, then returns to the riverside walkway. A couple stands by the railing looking at the water. The sun emerges creating a bright glare, and the stone balustrade remains visible along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy night urban street with illuminated buildings

events.description: abrupt transition to nighttime with rain and wet reflective surfaces
street lamps and building windows illuminate the dark rainy scene

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy city streets at night, passing parked cars and illuminated buildings

entered.detail: rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the glow of street lights
tall buildings with glowing windows against the dark stormy sky
enclosed glass pedestrian bridge connecting two office buildings
large satellite dishes mounted on the roof of a low building

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a rainy night. The character walks through wet city streets where the stone balustrade and river are no longer visible. Street lamps cast warm glows on the wet pavement, and skyscrapers with illuminated windows dominate the skyline. A skybridge connects two buildings overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern city waterfront that transforms from a bright autumn afternoon into a rainy urban night. It begins with the character walking along a concrete riverside promenade bordered by an ornate stone balustrade and glass skyscrapers, before turning left toward a parking area filled with cars. As the character returns to the walkway and passes a couple by the railing, the sun emerges to create a bright glare across the stone architecture. The scene then shifts abruptly to a rainy night, where the river disappears and the environment becomes a series of wet city streets illuminated by warm street lamps. Finally, the camera moves beneath a skybridge connecting two towering skyscrapers with glowing windows that dominate the dark skyline.
